Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractBuiltInRuleApp
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBuiltInRuleApp, RuleApp, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractBlockContractBuiltInRuleApp, AbstractLoopContractBuiltInRuleApp
public abstract class AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp extends AbstractBuiltInRuleApp
Application for AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.

      occurrence - the position at which the rule is applied.

    • cannotComplete

      public boolean cannotComplete(Goal goal)
      Parameters:
